description: Agilent E4406A VSA Series Transmitter Tester. SCPI over GPIB. The supplied User's Guide documents only a limited summary of SCPI commands (chiefly the Option B7C Baseband I/Q 'BbIQ Programming Commands' summary plus a few prose references); the complete command set lives in the separate Programmer's Guide and the per-personality measurement guides (GSM, EDGE, cdmaOne, cdma2000, W-CDMA, NADC/PDC, iDEN), which are not part of this source. This definition therefore contains only commands explicitly documented in E4406A_Manual.pdf.

identity.description: Standard IEEE 488.2 identification query. Returns manufacturer, model (E4406A), serial number, and firmware revision.

commands.name: select_instrument_mode
commands.description: Selects the active instrument mode / measurement personality. The appropriate mode must be selected before the corresponding CONFigure/FETCh/READ/MEASure measurement commands can be used. Documented in prose only in the User's Guide (mode mnemonics are defined in the Programmer's Guide).

parameters.name: mode
parameters.range: instrument mode / measurement personality (e.g. BASIC and any installed personality such as GSM, EDGE, cdmaOne, cdma2000, W-CDMA, NADC/PDC, iDEN)

commands.name: keyboard_lock
commands.description: Remotely locks (or unlocks) the front-panel keyboard. When locked, the Klock annunciator appears in white text. Documented in prose in the User's Guide.

commands.name: spectrum_iq_marker_query
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): reads out the current I and Q marker values for the Spectrum measurement.

commands.name: waveform_iq_marker_query
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): reads out the current I and Q marker values for the Waveform measurement.

commands.name: calibrate_iq_group
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): performs the IQ group of alignments. The query form performs the alignment and returns 0 if the alignment is successful.

commands.name: calibrate_iq_common_mode_null
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): forces a common mode response null on the I/Q inputs.

commands.name: calibrate_iq_flatness
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): activates a flatness calibration for all I/Q ranges and impedance settings.

commands.name: calibrate_iq_offset
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): activates a calibration of the I/Q input offset DAC.

commands.name: spectrum_y_scale_per_division
commands.description: Spectrum measurement: sets or queries the y-axis scale per division. Full form :DISPlay:SPECtrum[n]:WINDow[m]:TRACe:Y[:SCALe]:PDIVision.

commands.name: spectrum_y_reference_level
commands.description: Spectrum measurement: sets or queries the amplitude reference level for the y-axis. Full form :DISPlay:SPECtrum[n]:WINDow[m]:TRACe:Y[:SCALe]:RLEVel.

commands.name: waveform_y_scale_per_division
commands.description: Waveform measurement: sets or queries the y-axis scale per division. Full form :DISPlay:WAVeform[n]:WINDow[m]:TRACe:Y[:SCALe]:PDIVision.

commands.name: waveform_y_reference_level
commands.description: Waveform measurement: sets or queries the amplitude reference level for the y-axis. Full form :DISPlay:WAVeform[n]:WINDow[m]:TRACe:Y[:SCALe]:RLEVel.

commands.name: input_impedance_iq
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): selects the characteristic input impedance when the input port is set to I or Q. The value also encodes unbalanced (U) or balanced (B) impedance mode.

commands.name: input_impedance_reference
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): sets or queries the value of the input impedance reference when the input port is set to I or Q.

commands.name: input_iq_align
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): activates or deactivates IQ alignment.

commands.name: input_offset_i
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): sets or queries the adjustment to compensate for I voltage bias on signals when the I input port is selected.

commands.name: input_offset_q
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): sets or queries the adjustment to compensate for Q voltage bias on signals when the Q input port is selected.

commands.name: configure_spectrum
commands.description: Configures the instrument for the Spectrum (frequency domain) measurement, which measures the amplitude of the input signal versus frequency using FFT techniques. Requires the appropriate mode selected via INSTrument:SELect.

commands.name: fetch_spectrum
commands.description: Returns the most recent Spectrum (frequency domain) measurement result without re-arming. Full form :FETCh:SPECtrum[n]?.

parameters.name: n
parameters.range: result subopcode selecting which data set to return

commands.name: read_spectrum
commands.description: Initiates a Spectrum (frequency domain) measurement and returns the result. Full form :READ:SPECtrum[n]?.

parameters.name: n
parameters.range: result subopcode selecting which data set to return

commands.name: measure_spectrum
commands.description: Configures, initiates, and returns the Spectrum (frequency domain) measurement result in one command. Full form :MEASure:SPECtrum[n]?.

parameters.name: n
parameters.range: result subopcode selecting which data set to return

commands.name: configure_waveform
commands.description: Configures the instrument for the Waveform (time domain) measurement, which measures power versus time (equivalent to zero-span operation). Requires the appropriate mode selected via INSTrument:SELect.

commands.name: fetch_waveform
commands.description: Returns the most recent Waveform (time domain) measurement result without re-arming. Full form :FETCh:WAVeform[n]?.

parameters.name: n
parameters.range: result subopcode selecting which data set to return

commands.name: read_waveform
commands.description: Initiates a Waveform (time domain) measurement and returns the result. Full form :READ:WAVeform[n]?.

parameters.name: n
parameters.range: result subopcode selecting which data set to return

commands.name: measure_waveform
commands.description: Configures, initiates, and returns the Waveform (time domain) measurement result in one command. Full form :MEASure:WAVeform[n]?.

parameters.name: n
parameters.range: result subopcode selecting which data set to return

commands.name: sense_feed
commands.description: Selects the input signal source. Default is the front-panel RF INPUT port. For calibration/testing the input can be taken from the internal 321.4 MHz IF alignment signal or the internal 50 MHz amplitude reference. With Option B7C, the front-panel I and Q ports can be selected. Full form [:SENSe]:FEED.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: RF (front-panel RF INPUT)|IQ (combined I and Q ports, Option B7C)|IONLy (I port, Option B7C)|QONLy (Q port, Option B7C)|AREFerence (internal 50 MHz amplitude reference)|IFALign (internal 321.4 MHz IF alignment)

commands.name: sense_power_iq_range_upper
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): selects the maximum total power expected from the unit under test at the test port when the I or Q port is selected. Full form [:SENSe]:POWer:IQ:RANGe[:UPPer].

commands.name: sense_voltage_iq_range_upper
commands.description: Baseband I/Q (Option B7C): selects the upper voltage range when the I or Q port is selected. This setting helps set the gain in the baseband IQ variable gain block to improve dynamic range. Full form [:SENSe]:VOLTage:IQ:RANGe[:UPPer].
